commands.review_summary:
Adds a Matrix QA state-after E2EE regression scenario, extends the QA fault proxy to mutate forwarded responses, and updates scenario wiring, artifacts, and tests.

Reproducibility: not applicable. as a fresh bug reproduction: this PR adds after-fix QA coverage for an already-merged Matrix transport bug. The PR body includes real Matrix QA proof on AWS Crabbox with zero state-after opt-in hits and a passing suite.
